text: 4202 - وَ رَوَى أَبَانٌ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لاَ تَأْكُلِ اَلْجِرِّيَّ وَ لاَ اَلطِّحَالَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4202 - Aban narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
"Do not eat the eel (al-jirri) and do not eat the spleen (al-tihal)."
